creator: rtomimbang@math.upd.edu.ph
text:
Greetings Mr. Remko,
 
 I'm desperate to make my wireless device work. Is there anything I could
 do to remedy this problem or better yet, do I have no option but to wait
 for the next release of FreeBSD?
 
 I've tried all sort of stuff in loading and unloading modules to the
 kernel however, it seems the support for this device has not been made
 possible as of this writing (well as the scanpci -v showed).  Hope you
 could advise on my sanity.  :(
 
 Again, thanks so much for posting this problem on your website. I just
 hope I have the necessary development skills to help out on this problem.
 But, my experience and skill-set are limited to Systems Administration
 rather than device driver development.
 
 Cheers!!!
 
 
 -- 
 Ronald Allan V. Tomimbang
 Network/Systems Administrator
 Department of Mathematics
 University of the Philippines
